creator: freebsd.68fba@nospam.spacesurfer.com
text: Are you sure you meant www/webkit2-gtk3 version 2.30.2? The latest ports seems to be on 2.30.1_1. I have been running a patched 2.30.1_1 for a few days and my eclipse works fine. However, I would like to mention that the error in question can occur for many reasons, either its a slow javascript method or its the bug. I have always had occasional errors (nut just in FreeBSD) but they do not materially affect eclipse. In FreeBSD with an unpatched webkit2-gtk3 the errors happen very frequently and always for certain operations (help tooltip and code completion).
